/* Fraction.js v5.0.0 10/1/2024 https://raw.org/article/rational-numbers-in-javascript/ Copyright (c) 2024, Robert Eisele (https://raw.org/) Licensed under the MIT license. */ const Fraction = require('fraction.js'); function closestTapeMeasure(frac) { // A tape measure is usually divided in parts of 1/16 return Fraction(frac).roundTo("1/16"); } console.log(closestTapeMeasure("1/3")); // 5/16
